    • getLoaded

      public boolean getLoaded()
      True if the chunk containing the requested position is loaded for this
bot. When false, the block field is not populated.
      bool loaded = 1 [(.google.api.field_behavior) = REQUIRED];
      Specified by:
      getLoaded in interface GetBlockResponseOrBuilder
      Returns:
      The loaded.
